CustomField.label: NEPA Process
CustomField.description: The NEPA IndividualApplication (review process) this field-survey Work Order supports. Populated by NEPA_Work_Order_Generator at creation. Enables reporting work orders by review type, stage, and process status. Cleared (SetNull) if the IndividualApplication is deleted.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The NEPA review process (EA, EIS, CE) this Work Order supports.
